title: Xylosma chlorantha Donn. Sm.
author: MONRO, A. K.

description: Xylosma chlorantha  Donn.Sm.    (CR), Cachos de venado (P).     Terrestrial shrubs or trees. Distribution in PILA 0–1800 m, low elevation mixed forest, mixed forest in transition to low elevation forest, mixed forest in transition to cloud forest, cloud forest. Global distribution: Mexico to Panama. Records:  A. Rodríguez 10297  (INB).
